categories.description: Sent to tenant admins when a new custom Sport (or Discipline / Position) is added to the tenant's catalog. Distinct from SportCatalogSeeded — the platform catalog fires silently (system invariant). Opt-in; default on for admins + owners.

categories.display_name: Sport reference could not be resolved
categories.description: Sent when the reconciler detects a Wave 3 row referencing a sport_key / discipline_key / position_key that doesn't resolve against the tenant's merged catalog. Includes { source_table, source_row_id, unresolved_value }. Throttled — one notification per (tenant, source_table, source_row_id) per hour to prevent notification flood when a whole table has drift. Cannot opt out because dangling references may break downstream enrollment flows.

Sent to tenant admins when the platform catalog changes (adds new sports, updates existing, deactivates removed). Includes a summary { added: [slugs], updated: [slugs], deactivated: [slugs] }. Opt-in; default OFF (most tenants don't care about platform catalog evolution — those that do (Enterprise with heavy sport-specific configs) opt in).
